commit.subject: LU-0000 zfs: revert LU-4865
commit.message:
LU-0000 zfs: revert LU-4865

Revert "LU-4865 zfs: grow block size by write pattern"

This reverts commit 3e4369135127b350dbc26a4a5dc94cfa46e394cf.

Test-Parameters: fortestonly
Signed-off-by: Jinshan Xiong <jinshan.xiong@intel.com>
Change-Id: I30b2522c5c3ac6993a5d2b058a59c5b9e4040c47
